headline.primary_headline: New FDA Approved Treatment Proven to Relieve Knee Pain

curiosity_architecture.incomplete_pattern: What is this FDA-approved treatment? Reader must call to find out

schema_analysis.existing_schema: Knee pain means surgery or lifelong medication

headline.mechanism_note: Treatment mechanism intentionally withheld - lead gen strategy
headline.vsl_adaptation: There's a reason your doctor never told you about this FDA-approved knee pain treatment... and it has nothing to do with whether it works

lead.opening_verbatim: Did you know that over 100 million Americans suffer from knee and joint pain? In fact, this pain accounts for 25% of all visits to primary care physicians and half of all anti-inflammatory drug prescriptions. We're pleased to announce that knee pain sufferers don't have to wait any longer to get the most advanced non-surgical FDA approved treatment.
lead.transition_to_body: If you suffer from any degree of knee pain, we invite you to regain control of your life...

mechanism.mechanism_name: Advanced Live Motion Sonography Injection Therapy
mechanism.mechanism_description: Advanced live motion sonography allows pinpoint accuracy for treatment delivery - implied viscosupplementation or PRP injection
mechanism.mechanism_hint_verbatim: Advanced live motion sonography allows us to pinpoint problem areas with extreme accuracy
mechanism.mechanism_note: Mechanism intentionally obscured - classic lead gen technique to drive phone calls

proof_elements.verbatim: New FDA Approved Treatment Proven to Relieve Knee Pain
over 100 million Americans suffer from knee and joint pain... accounts for 25% of all visits to primary care physicians and half of all anti-inflammatory drug prescriptions
Medicare and most major insurances will pay for some if not all of our services
Medical and Clinic Directors - Sheldon Lebovitz, D.O. - Joel A. Stutzman, D.C.
Aligned Medical, a state-of-the-art 6000 ft. medical facility

key_sections.content_summary: Defines OA as degenerative joint disease, describes cartilage breakdown, lists causes including weight, age, injury, genetics

key_sections.content_verbatim: Do you wake up with knee pain? Does your knee pain keep you from certain activities? Have you been told you need a knee replacement? Are you active and sometimes suffer from sore knees? Do you take medications for knee pain? Do you have difficulty going up and down stairs due to knee pain? Are you considering surgery to alleviate knee pain? Have you tried everything to get rid of knee pain with no success?

Treatment at Aligned Medical vs Surgery - Cost: Covered by most insurance plans including Medicare vs Deductible, copay, medications, time off work. Risk: Redness, swelling possible at injection site vs Complications, poor outcome, addiction to pain medications. Pain: Little to none vs Can be severe for months. Recovery: Immediate vs Months/years

offer.urgency_mechanism: Space is limited! we have opened up our schedule and we are now accepting new patients
offer.cta: Call today to schedule your FREE Consultation

D.O. and D.C. credentials - osteopath and chiropractor team
Viscosupplementation or PRP injection implied but never named
